title: LAFS Context Ledger
description: Tracks state across request/response cycles for context preservation

ledgerId.description: Unique identifier for this context ledger instance

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the ledger was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last ledger update

entryId.description: Unique identifier for this ledger entry

operation.description: The operation that generated this entry

contextDelta.description: The context changes introduced by this operation

requestId.description: Correlation with the request that produced this entry

checksum.description: Integrity checksum of the ledger contents

maxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries before truncation/compaction
